- Output Exceeds Input CHAR 1 Indicates the patient is dehydrated - output excees input. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
100 J1E J1E_DELUSIONS 27b(J1e)Delusions CHAR 1 Indicates the patient has delusions - fixed, false beliefs not shared by others that the patient holds even when there is obvious proof or evidence to the contrary. 0 = Unchecked, 1 = Checked, -1 = Unknown
